title: Padre contra hijo
writer: Carlos Arniches, Juan Bustillo Oro, Antonio Helú
actors: Manolo Fábregas, Julio Villarreal, Silvia Derbez
plot: Eloísa works hard, sewing, so that her son Juan de Dios becomes a lawyer, but he finds out that he is the bastard son of the owner of almost the whole town of San Juan de Dios, Durango.
